blocks.text: It is a highly recommended Sunnah to remain seated after the obligatory (Fard) prayer and engage in specific remembrances.
أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ، أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ، أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ. اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ السَّلَامُ وَمِنْكَ السَّلَامُ، تَبَارَكْتَ يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ
blocks.translation: I seek Allah's forgiveness (3 times). O Allah, You are As-Salam (the Source of Peace) and from You comes peace. Blessed are You, O Possessor of Majesty and Honor.

blocks.text: The Reward of Reciting Ayatul Kursi
Reciting Ayatul Kursi after every obligatory prayer has a unique reward.
The Prophet (peace be upon him) said: 'Whoever recites Ayatul Kursi after every prescribed prayer, nothing will prevent him from entering Paradise except death.'
